response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains, with most professional work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile systems; while there is minor C++ exposure from a 6-month role at National Instruments, it is neither recent nor domain-relevant, and there is no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or financial systems experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated expertise in CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/Windows development in financial systems
Lacks demonstrated fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed but not tied to SQL Server/Oracle in enterprise financial contexts
